The '''''Courage of Sullust''''' was a modified [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|GR-75 medium transport]] which was used to carry ten [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] of the [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] during a diplomatic mission to [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]]. In that occasion, the ''Courage of Sullust'' was accompanied by the ''[[Pulsar Skate]]'', carrying [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and his X-wing fighter. Later on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], it was loaded with addictive [[Spice/Legends|spice]] to be used in a top-secret [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] project.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: The Krytos Trap]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: The Krytos Trap (unabridged audiobook)}}
